service_ref.description: Must match service_id in service.yaml exactly

ttd_minutes.description: Time to Detect — from first alert to acknowledgement

ttir_minutes.description: Time to Initiate Recovery — from acknowledgement to first recovery action

ttcr_minutes.description: Time to Complete Recovery — active repair duration

ttvr_minutes.description: Time to Validate Recovery — confirmation that service is fully restored

backup_frequency_minutes.description: Interval between backup snapshots in minutes

data_change_rate_gb_per_hour.description: Average rate of data change between backups

incident_frequency_per_day.description: Average number of service-impacting incidents per day. Minimum 0.001 to prevent division by zero in MTBF calculation.

rtd_minutes.description: Recovery Times for Dependencies — weighted average of all upstream dependency RTOs

ncd_count.description: Number of Critical Dependencies whose failure cascades to this service

ic.description: Infrastructure Complexity. 1=Simple, 3=Moderate, 5=Very Complex. Inflates MTTR via (IC-1)/4.

gd.description: Geographic Distribution. 1=Single site, 2=Multi-site same region, 3=Multi-region. Inflates MTTR via (GD-1)/4.

ra.description: Resource Availability. 1=Limited, 2=Adequate, 3=Abundant. Deflates MTBF via RA/3.

sea.description: Staff Expertise and Availability. 1=Limited, 2=Competent, 3=Expert. Deflates MTBF via SEA/3.

sc.description: Service Criticality. 1=Mission Critical, 2=High, 3=Medium, 4=Low. Adjusts RTO via SC/4.

csr.description: Customer-Specific Requirements flag. 0=Standard SLA, 1=Customer override active.

customer_rto_minutes.description: Customer-mandated RTO. Ignored in calculations when CSR is 0.

customer_rpo_minutes.description: Customer-mandated RPO. Ignored in calculations when CSR is 0.
